klaviyo_description: Marketing automation for Email Marketing, SMS & CDP
mailchimp_description: The email and SMS marketing automations platform that helps you boost opens, clicks and sales
enable_to_connect_warning: Please enable the integration to proceed with the connection
api_key_invalid: Invalid API key, please re-enter or use another key

klaviyo.section_description: Synchronize customer profiles, create lists & segments, and set up email campaign with Klaviyo
klaviyo.modal_instructions: Follow <1>this guide</1> to get Klaviyo's API key. Then enter API key and click Connect.
klaviyo.toast_sync_fail: Sync data failed, please try again.

mailchimp.section_description: Synchronize contacts, and set up email campaigns and automations with Mailchimp
mailchimp.modal_instructions: Follow <1>this guide</1> to get Mailchimp's API key. Then enter API key and click Connect.
mailchimp.audience_id_invalid: Invalid Audience ID, please re-enter or use another Audience ID
mailchimp.batch_status_error: Failed to get Mailchimp batch status
mailchimp.sync_failed_retry: Sync data failed, please try again.
